name: 13q32_ZIC2_SD
description: ZIC2 (holoprosencephaly type 5) at 13q32.3 is flanked by small SDs (5-15 kb at 93-96% identity) shared with the ZIC5/ZIC1 paralog cluster on chr3 and chr18. A polyalanine expansion in ZIC2 plus rare deletions cause HPE5. Small SDs additionally contribute to ZIC2 intragenic rearrangements.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-15 kb SD pairs flanking ZIC2; ZIC5 paralog 200 kb distal forms an inverted SD pair shared with chr3 ZIC1/ZIC4.
